  "findings": [
    "Lack of torque verification or torque marking on feeder terminations"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Torque the feeder lugs to the manufacturer's specified torque values using a calibrated torque wrench",
    "Apply torque paint/marking to the tightened lugs to visually indicate compliance",
    "Document the torque values on a quality control record sheet"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under NEC 110.14(D), where a tightening torque is indicated on the equipment or in installation instructions, a calibrated torque tool must be used to tighten the joint. Because there is no evidence, torque marks, or documentation showing that the lugs were torqued to the marked values, the installation cannot be accepted as compliant.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.14(D)"
  ]
}
